title: t0gp smp
description: a client mod pack aimed at optimizing the game, improving the game play in multi player and single player
body:
a client mod pack aimed at optimizing the game, improving the game play in multi player and single player

# advantages of this modpack:

1. optimizes the game - uses Sodium and other mods to get better performance

2. allows you to improve the quality of graphics with shader packs and mods that can be customized and enabled at your discretion

3. improves the experience of playing on servers by adding voice chat

4. uses a set of mods based on Fabric to replace OptiFine functions

5. is open to suggestions - users can suggest their changes to improve the modpack

6. adds the ability to enable a dark theme to improve the interface

7. improves the security of the game with No Chat Reports
